hero.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
hero.author: Theodore Roosevelt

aries.general: Today is a day for new adventures. Embrace changes and take bold steps.
aries.love: Romance may flourish under the stars today; share your feelings openly.
aries.career: Professional opportunities are on the horizon; be prepared to seize them.

taurus.general: Stability is key today. Find comfort in your routines and build on them.
taurus.love: Communicate clearly with your partner; misunderstandings can be avoided.
taurus.career: Focus on collaboration; others may need your patience and support.

gemini.general: Engage in conversations that inspire and motivate you. Your words have power.
gemini.love: A playful energy surrounds you in your romantic life. Enjoy the flirtation.
gemini.career: Networking is highlighted; reach out to old contacts for opportunities.

cancer.general: Emotions may be heightened today. Take time for self-care and reflection.
cancer.love: Reinforce your bonds; a little effort can go a long way in love.
cancer.career: Trust your instincts in professional decisions; your gut feeling is strong.

leo.general: Step into the spotlight today; your charisma will attract attention.
leo.love: Express your affection boldly; your partner will appreciate your confidence.
leo.career: Your creativity is at its peak; pursue innovative projects or ideas.

virgo.general: Details matter today; focus on the small things for greater success.
virgo.love: Be open to new experiences in love; an unexpected encounter awaits.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills will shine; take on challenges that require precision.

libra.general: Balance is essential today; seek harmony in all areas of your life.
libra.love: Compromise may be necessary in relationships; find common ground.
libra.career: Collaborative projects will thrive; your diplomatic nature is an asset.

scorpio.general: Today is about transformation; embrace the changes coming your way.
scorpio.love: Deep conversations can bring you closer; don't shy away from vulnerability.
scorpio.career: Your determination can overcome obstacles; stay focused on your goals.

sagittarius.general: Adventure is in the air; seek out new experiences and explore the unknown.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity may enhance your love life; plan a surprise for your partner.
sagittarius.career: Pursue learning opportunities; expanding your knowledge will benefit you.

capricorn.general: Today is about responsibility. Focus on fulfilling your obligations.
capricorn.love: Show appreciation for your partner; small gestures will make a big impact.
capricorn.career: Structure and discipline will lead to success; stick to your plans.

aquarius.general: Innovation and creativity are favored today; think outside the box.
aquarius.love: A unique perspective in relationships can spark excitement; share your thoughts.
aquarius.career: Connect with like-minded individuals to brainstorm new ideas.

pisces.general: Trust your intuition today; it will guide you toward positive outcomes.
pisces.love: Emotional connections deepen; nurture your relationships with care.
pisces.career: Artistic talents may shine; consider expressing them in your work.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
professional.author: C.S. Lewis

professional.text: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
professional.author: Theodore Roosevelt

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.
motivation.author: Roy T. Bennett

motivation.text: Setting goals is the first step in turning the invisible into the visible.
motivation.author: Tony Robbins

motivation.text: You cannot swim for new horizons until you have courage to lose sight of the shore.
motivation.author: William Faulkner

motivation.text: Change your thoughts and you change your world.
motivation.author: Norman Vincent Peale

motivation.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

captions.text: Chase the sunset, not the spotlight.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Every day is a fresh start.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Shine bright, like the stars in the night.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Embrace the glorious mess that you are.
captions.author: Elizabeth Gilbert

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The great growling engine of change - technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: It is not that we are not blessed to have technology, but we are blessed to have the capability to use it.
tech.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

tech.text: An investment in knowledge always pays the best interest.
tech.author: Benjamin Franklin

tech.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
tech.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer that I needed a break, and it froze!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common, it’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I would like to be a unicorn so I could be in the air without making any noise!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I used to play piano by ear, but now I use my hands.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t skeletons fight each other? They don’t have the guts!
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is not the belief that God will do what you want, but the belief that God will do what is right.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: You may say I'm a dreamer, but I'm not the only one. I hope someday you'll join us.
faith.author: John Lennon

faith.text: All things are possible for one who believes.
faith.author: Mark 9:23

faith.text: Faith sees the invisible, believes the unbelievable, and receives the impossible.
faith.author: Corrie ten Boom

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fear.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, remember that knowledge is not enough; we must also apply it.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: Wisdom consists of the anticipation of consequences.
wisdom.author: Norman Cousins

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the reward you get for a lifetime of listening when you would rather have talked.
wisdom.author: Mark Twain
